name: Adzuki Bean Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Leeks (trimmed, washed well and sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the beans to a boil in fresh water and simmer until tender (about 35 minutes). Drain and set aside, reserving the liquid.
2. Heat margarine in a large pot. Add onion and cook until transparent.
3. Add garlic, leeks, carrot, and mushrooms, and cook gently for 4 to 5 minutes.
4. Stir in paprika, cayenne pepper, and flour.
5. Add vegetable stock, soy sauce, tomato paste, chopped tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer gently for 10 minutes.
6. Stir in the beans and bring back to a boil.
7. Add dumplings (see instructions below) and return to a gentle simmer until heated through (20-25 minutes).
8. Sprinkle generously with parsley before serving.
For Dumplings:
1. Mix flour and salt in a bowl.
2. Rub margarine into the mixture until it resembles fine breadcrumbs.
3. Stir in parsley and add just enough liquid to form a firm dough.
4. Divide into 8 pieces and shape into dumplings.
